headline: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. Acquires Bridge Insurance Brokers Limited
summary: Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. today announced the acquisition of UK-based Bridge Insurance Brokers Limited ("Bridge"). Terms of the transaction were not disclosed.
